summary: The codebase-memory-mcp repository provides a high-speed code intelligence engine that indexes codebases and enables efficient querying through a persistent knowledge graph. It is designed for AI coding agents, offering support for 158 programming languages with zero dependencies and a user-friendly installation process.
use_cases: Indexing a large codebase like the Linux kernel for rapid analysis
Integrating with coding agents to enhance code exploration
Visualizing code relationships and architecture through a 3D graph interface
